mapper.sql: id, message_key, order_number, user_id, program_id, topic, retry_count, max_retry_count, message_status, payload, last_error, create_time, edit_time, status
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO d_order_async_message (message_key, order_number, user_id, program_id, topic, retry_count, max_retry_count, message_status, payload, last_error, create_time, edit_time, status) VALUES (#{messageKey}, #{orderNumber}, #{userId}, #{programId}, #{topic}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetryCount}, #{messageStatus}, #{payload}, #{lastError}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM d_order_async_message WHERE message_key = #{messageKey} AND status = 1
SELECT FROM d_order_async_message WHERE order_number = #{orderNumber} AND status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE d_order_async_message SET message_status = #{sentStatus}, topic = #{topic}, last_error = NULL, edit_time = #{now} WHERE message_key = #{messageKey} AND status = 1
UPDATE d_order_async_message SET message_status = #{retryingStatus}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, last_error = #{lastError}, edit_time = #{now} WHERE message_key = #{messageKey} AND status = 1
UPDATE d_order_async_message SET message_status = #{deadStatus}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, last_error = #{lastError}, edit_time = #{now} WHERE message_key = #{messageKey} AND status = 1
